rules.description: Only capabilities with durable responsibility, distinct authority, separate auditability, and lifecycle value may become first-class agents.
No single first-class agent may originate proposal intent, generate implementation, perform final audit, and promote the same change.
Promotion to live always requires explicit human approval.
Hard canon may not be modified outside the defined governance path.
Every material patch must complete in-progress audit before promotion review.
Every material patch must include rollback notes.
